title: cyperus rehmannianus
intro: Cyperus rehmannianus, also known as Cape sedge or Rehmann's sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus rehmannianus include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate rheumatism. Cyperus rehmannianus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
